character_dossiers.name: Doctor Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group negotiating with Cap'n Silver; involved in the flag of truce discussion

character_dossiers.name: Cap'n Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Led the negotiation with Doctor Livesey; established a blockhouse and secured supplies

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Revealed his role in the ship's loss and the murder of the men aboard the schooner

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the buccaneer group; identified as Morgan by the crew
